items.briefing:
Australian organisations are rapidly adopting AI tools, including OpenAI's newly launched ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6 in Australia, but security experts warn this rush introduces significant risks. AI gateways — the connectors that link AI tools to business systems — can become serious security weak points if not properly configured, potentially giving attackers broad access to sensitive data and internal systems.

Microsoft has also patched a zero-day vulnerability called RoguePlanet, so ensure your devices and software are fully updated. **Practical tip:** Before connecting any new AI tool to your work systems, check with your IT team to ensure access permissions are appropriately restricted.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread CMS vulnerability exploitation targeting Australian organizations directly.
